what_it_does: This file is a ledger-style metadata record for an image asset: it registers a JPEG named p-15 in the design-source channel under capital-raise, linking it to a blob hash, an author session, and a creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id capital-raise/p-15, address image://design-source/capital-raise/p-15, channel design-source, path capital-raise/p-15, blob blob://b2:f7e8344bcb85e00f8f3f8f00dcb791c9, mime image/jpeg, name p-15
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-15.jpg'
standouts: The image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite being a JPEG
It is explicitly labeled as 'SOURCE design ground-truth'
It carries a blob hash and an author session for provenance
concerns: Width and height being 0 suggests missing or unpopulated image metadata
No descriptive caption or content tags for the image itself
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
notes: A provenance stub for a capital-raise design image (p-15) that records blob and authorship but lacks dimensions and content description.
questions: What visual content does capital-raise/p-15.jpg actually contain?
Why are the width and height values 0?
How is this image intended to be used within the capital-raise deck?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as design ground-truth metadata for capital-raise/p-15.jpg; the file does exactly that as a metadata record, though it is missing image dimensions.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to establish an authoritative, addressable record for a design image used in a capital-raise context, anchored by a blob hash and author session.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable metadata entry and blob reference for an image asset, supporting retrieval, provenance, and channel-based organization.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger entry registering the JPEG image p-15 in the design-source/capital-raise channel with a blob hash, author session, and creation timestamp, labeled as design ground-truth.
intention_for_embedding: To record provenance and provide a stable reference for a design-source image asset related to a capital-raise document.
